title: Hear From The First-Ever Openly Gay AFL Player, Leigh Ryzwyk | 10 News
description: Former Brisbane Lion and North Adelaide footballer Leigh Ryzwyk has become the first openly gay past or present player in men's AFL. title: Social Media Addiction Lawsuit Wins, Kids Mental Health Alarm, New Guthrie Case Clue | 10 News+
description: Following the landmark lawsuit which found Meta and Google liable for addictive social media content, could a similar case be made here? Many seem to think so, including this young Aussie who claims the platforms targeted her vulnerabilities with addictive content leading to her mental health and anorexia diagnosis.  As the fuel crisis bites and the war grinds on, the Australian economy is changing in front of our eyes. From car sales to cafes, to how we get to work, Australians are making new choices in a bid to cut rising costs.  Off the back of Savannah Guthrie’s first TV interview since her mother’s alleged abduction, a private investigator reveals the reason the Guthrie family should hold onto hope that the mystery behind their elderly mother’s disappearance will be solved.  A confronting new study suggests a huge number of young Australian children are dealing with mental health issues. Experts are now asking a difficult question: have we been failing our kids, or are we just over-diagnosing?  From IV drips to oxygen therapy, “biohacking” is booming across Australia — promising better health, faster recovery and longer lives. But experts warn the science may not match the hype.  10 News+ LIVE: Trusted, in-depth reporting from Australia and around the world. 👍 Like this stream to support our in-depth coverage 🔔 Subscribe and turn on notifications for breaking news alerts ↗ Share this coverage to keep others informed  📲 Stay Across Breaking News 24/7 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/10NewsPlus/ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@10newsplus/ Snapchat: https://www.snapchat.com/add/tennewsplus 🎧 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/0tWZ6sIJTQ2WHgYdjgaAA7?si=cb30d7fd3d3541fa  📺 Watch 10 News+ 6pm Monday–Friday | 6:30pm Sunday on Network 10 Missed the bulletin? Catch up anytime 👉 https://10.com.au/news/  10 News+ is based in Australia and is a division of Paramount.
